transcript.text:
Traditional Korean Chicken Steak
I'll eat it just like this
Wow, it's so good..
No one can calculate how much she can eat..
I will be eating this humongous chicken delightfully
Omg how?
Hello, everyone, I'm here today to eat traditional Korean chicken
I heard that traditional Korean chicken are slowly going away
Because we are always eating imported chicken from other countries
I'm here with a grateful heart to bring our traditional chicken back
I ate the traditional Korean chicken not too long ago on a program "My Little Television"
It was so good that I still cannot forget about the taste to this day
So I got in touch with the professor that I went on the show with, Just to eat it once more!
I'm off to eat the delicious Korean chicken!
*Tzuyang being cold
Entering for traditional Korean chicken~!

It's very chewy,
and tastes better than regular chicken
*Tzuyang's fan requests for an autograph
*She's so nervous
I just ate the chicken from here
I held up just only half of the chicken
and it was like THIS big.
The 2 of us shared half of the chicken
and we were surprised to be full.
You're so pretty!
I wish you happiness. Thank you!
Reservation is required if you wish you come during these dates.
Korea is currently giving out traditional Korean chicken free of cost to the restaurants, so we can all enjoy the chicken at a very low cost!
I want to eat this as a whole!
Like this!
Professor!

Hello~
I went on the show "My Little Television" with him recently,
He's currently doing a campaign on the Korean chicken
It's a national business
All the chicken that we eat here in Korea are mostly imported
We may not know it but, we are constantly paying great amount of money for these imports
It's called the Loyalty Fee
Just on chicken alone, we pay about $12 million dollars annually.
It takes a lot of time to raise the Korean chickens, So that means that we need to feed them more
The breeders and companies are slowly not raising the Korean chickens because the demand rate dropped
I'll eat our Korean chicken deliciously so that they don't go extinct.
You can choose either Marinated or Salted
Marinated or Salted?
Then I'll have 1 Marinated and 1 Salted. 2 chickens total!
Oh my, it's super heavy..
This is our traditional Korean chicken

It's so heavy..
It's huge right? this is just half of the chicken..
The portion might be enough
Even if 2 people shared this piece
Around 600g?
Omg, it's so big. Wow
There are a lot of ways to eat the traditional Korean chicken,
But they say that it's best when you eat it like a steak.
The taste will vary depending on how you cook the meat
So usually, you'll cook it as a whole
And cut up the pieces by different parts
They will go extinct if I don't eat it!
They usually do not cook for you, But they will tell you how!
I'll divide the breast and the thigh here.
This is so small haha
How's this chicken breast?

It tastes more like chicken tenderloin
I only tried the leg and thigh on the program "My Little Television"
But the chicken breast is surprisingly good!
It's good with pickled green onion
N O
Okay, I'll give it a try
Thank you
It's a good combination!
It's delicious
Now try the leg and thigh
This is the best part
*Put it here please
Wow the leg...
is about 3 times better than the breast. It's soooo good..
Thank you
It's so big,, let's show the camera. *fail

The leg is really chewy
Almost like a jelly
Do you see the meat juice drip?
It's so juicy...
This is the leg that I ate on the show "My Little Television"
This is really really good...
*hot
It tastes so good...
This is so much better than regular chicken
There's a prejudice that traditional Korean chicken is tough and rubbery
But it's not like that at all
It's just really chewy!
The method of cooking really changes the taste
*The manager gives her Plum Juice on the house
THANK YOU!
There's so much meat on just 1 chicken

A regular chicken is about 700g
But the Korean chicken weighs 1.2 kg JUST for the meat
Do you see the juice? The grease?
It's so good.
This is so thick. T H I C C
So hot
This is..
Garlic marinated
I have personally never tried this before
How's this possible?
BWow this one is even bigger..
Bigger than the one before
Wow take a look at this
So thick
T H I C C
It's for sure that

The taste changes on how you cook the meat
It's best when you grill it and eat it right away
Chicken leg and thigh
Take it just like this
Wow
Wow. It's so good..
Really. Wow.
This is garlic marinated. I'll give this a try.
It's good! Wow!
You can just cook it just about right on the outside
Which one is better Garlic or Salted? I like them both :P
I can't choose. I'm sorry.
They're both so good that I don't know how to explain..
It's not murder! It's a revival!
Finally, the leg...
It looks like it's ready to eat!

I'll cut up the leg so that it's ready to eat
Don't eat it like this though,
Cut up however much you want to eat,
and eat/cut as you go.
I did this because I'm going to eat them fast
Yay! it's just the skin! I love this part!
*Bouncy
It's so big. I can't get used to the size..
I've been wanting to eat this for a long time. The leg meat.
*ordered additional half serving of the marinated
Wow the breast on this is smaller and has more leg meat!
I love it!
Hurry and finish cooking~
*Manager refills plum juice
Really? Thank you!
Plum Juice!

Sauce? Don't think there's sauce for this
Here's egg yolk!
It's good!
Egg.. Chicken?
Egg.. Chicken?
Sorry!
How dare I dip chicken in egg..
But it's good, so one more time!
Super size.
No, it's not an ostrich!
I am pretty confident in cooking meat
The reason why Korean chicken is expensive is that they are raised longer
and they eat a lot more. Almost 2 times?
Tzuyang eats a lot too. But I'm a human!
It looks so good~
The skin is super thick

It's so fluffy
Skin is amazing
It's delicious even to the last bite
I usually get sick of the taste towards the end, but this is so good..
Last bite!
That last bite was delicious..
Thank you!
It's amazing how she only eats meat. She didn't even touch the veggies.
It's beautiful how she communicates with her fans while she eats her meal
And she's so good at eating!
November 26~November 30th (5 days total) RegularSix Grill Room is taking reservations. Korea is distributing Korean chicken for free to these restaurants so that the consumers can enjoy them at a low cost!
Subtitles by Hyun Choi antharoni@gmail.com
